rule.desc: Prefer `@BeforeEach` for fixtures; avoid mutable shared state.
rule.rationale: Isolated tests are deterministic and parallel-safe.

rule.desc: Tests must not depend on execution order or shared state.
rule.rationale: Order dependence causes flaky CI behavior.

examples.example: Use fresh data builders per test.

rule.desc: Mock external systems (DB/HTTP/clock). Do not mock value objects or simple DTOs.
rule.rationale: Over-mocking couples tests to implementation details.

rule.desc: Avoid wall-clock time, random, and sleep in tests.
Separate unit and integration tests with tags or naming.
rule.rationale: Keeps fast feedback loops while retaining coverage.
